mechanism: Positive 30Y-SPX correlation means long-duration Treasuries compound losses during equity drawdowns rather than hedging them, structurally degrading their portfolio construction utility and making them the worst risk-adjusted position in a fiscal dominance regime.
regime_dependence: Holds in partial fiscal dominance (current state); would intensify if 2Y-SPX also turns positive (full fiscal dominance). The relationship is strongest during stress episodes.
